title: Privacy Policy
intro: At Pallavi Photography, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.
sec1Text: At Pallavi Photography, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.
sec2Text: We may collect information about you in a variety of ways. The information we may collect on the Site includes:
sec2Bullet1: Name and Email Address: When you request a quote or booking, we collect your name and email address.
sec2Bullet2: Phone Number: For booking inquiries and consultations.
sec2Bullet3: Session Details: Information about your photography session preferences, dates, and location.
sec2Bullet4: Payment Information: When you make a purchase, we collect payment details through our secure payment processor (we do not store credit card information directly).
sec2Bullet5: Website Usage Data: We may collect information about how you interact with our website, including pages visited, time spent, and links clicked.
sec3Text: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
sec3Bullet1: To fulfill your booking requests and provide photography services
sec3Bullet2: To send you booking confirmations and updates
sec3Bullet3: To communicate with you about your session
sec3Bullet5: To improve our website and services
sec3Bullet6: To send you promotional emails (only if you've opted in)
sec4Text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information with:
sec4Bullet1: Service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business (e.g., payment processors, email service providers)
sec4Bullet2: Legal authorities when required by law
sec4Bullet3: With your consent, we may share session photos with third-party platforms (e.g., portfolio sites, social media) for promotional purposes
sec5Text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, please note that no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is completely secure.
sec6Text: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences. We use cookies to:
sec6Bullet2: Understand how you use our site
sec7Text: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including:
sec7Bullet1: The right to access your personal data
sec7Bullet2: The right to request deletion of your data
sec7Bullet3: The right to opt-out of marketing communications
sec7Bullet4: The right to data portability (in certain jurisdictions)
sec7Contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at
sec8Text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites before providing personal information.
sec9Text: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child, we will delete such information promptly.
sec10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will notify you of any material changes by updating the "Last Updated" date on this page. Your continued use of the website following the posting of changes constitutes your acceptance of such changes.
sec11Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:
